purpose: Supply, procurement, delivery, payment, liability, and termination.

expected_clauses.why_expected: Price, invoices, and payment timing define commercial obligations.
Exit and cancellation rights affect supply continuity.
Supply failures, indemnity, and damages need allocation.

false_positive_guardrails: Do not classify as SaaS unless software, subscription, license, platform, or data processing signals appear.
Purchase order language may contain payment and scope details.
Audit rights are not always mandatory but may matter for regulated procurement.
